title: chrysosplenium qinlingense
intro: Chrysosplenium qinlingense is a rare, endangered species of flowering plant in the family Saxifragaceae, native to China. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial effects, which can be attributed to its chemical compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Chrysosplenium qinlingense include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antiviral and anticancer activities. Traditionally, it is prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions to be used in folk medicine, and its extracts are also used in modern pharmaceutical and food applications.
